identity_traits: large turtle-like shell covering the back
quadrupedal stance with four sturdy legs
arm-like appendages extending from the shell sides
distinctive rounded head with small eyes
smooth, glossy blue skin on limbs
gray and brown accents on shell
original_type_traits: streamlined shell shape for aquatic movement
anchor_phrases: quadruped, four legs planted on ground, low crawling stance
large, symmetrical shell covering the entire back
arm-like appendages extending horizontally from shell sides

visual_facts.silhouette: The Pokémon has a robust, four-legged body with a large shell on its back, resembling a turtle.
